mission: Collect independent attributed perspectives and produce an adjudicated recommendation without granting multiple writers access to one branch.

steps.action: Hash one minimized prompt packet as inputSha256 and give the identical packet to architect and builder.
Run architect and builder independently; prohibit shared scratch state and branch mutation.
Record actual executor, provider, exact model, endpoint class, role, timestamps, and proof ceiling for each output.
Preserve consensus, divergence, unresolved risks, rejected alternatives, and source references.
Accept one bounded approach or block with explicit unresolved questions; do not average incompatible claims.
Send only the accepted bounded approach, constraints, validations, and proof ceiling to the designated writer.

stopConditions: role outputs are not independently attributable
proofCeiling: Fusion contract and artifact shape only; no model independence, response quality, runtime execution, or implementation correctness proof.
